system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.mes_dinhmuc_trangthai_phathanh","body":"CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[MES_DINHMUC_TRANGTHAI_PHATHANH]
(
   @masp_nhamay nvarchar(50),
   @masp_mausac nvarchar(MAX),
   @bomType nvarchar(10),
   @trangthai bit = 1
)
AS
BEGIN
	--DECLARE @masp_nhamay nvarchar(50) = '800 030'
	--DECLARE @masp_mausac nvarchar(MAX) = 'AKZ001, SEN001'
	--DECLARE @bomType nvarchar(10) = 'GVA'
	--DECLARE @trangthai bit = 1

	DECLARE @DS_SANPHAM TABLE
	(
	  masp nvarchar(200),
	  mausac nvarchar(200)
	)

	IF ISNULL(@masp_mausac, '') <> ''
	BEGIN
	  INSERT @DS_SANPHAM(masp, mausac)
	  SELECT masp, mausac
	  FROM tr_sanpham
	  WHERE masp_nhamay = @masp_nhamay
		AND mausac IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM([value])) FROM fn_Split(@masp_mausac, ','))
	END  
	ELSE
	BEGIN
	  INSERT @DS_SANPHAM(masp, mausac)
	  SELECT masp, mausac
	  FROM tr_sanpham
	  WHERE masp_nhamay = @masp_nhamay
	END


	DECLARE @masp nvarchar(200);
	DECLARE @mausac nvarchar(200);
	DECLARE @nguyenlieu nvarchar(max);
	DECLARE cur CURSOR LOCAL FOR
	  SELECT masp, mausac FROM @DS_SANPHAM
	OPEN cur
	FETCH NEXT FROM cur INTO @masp, @mausac
	WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0
	BEGIN
  
	  IF @bomType = 'GVA'
	  BEGIN
		UPDATE tr_sanpham
		SET IsGoVan = @trangthai
		WHERE masp = @masp

		-- tổng số khối tinh chế
		DECLARE @m3_tc float, @m2_tc float;
		SELECT @m3_tc = SUM(m3_tc),
			@m2_tc = SUM(rong_tc * dai_tc * soluong_tc) / 1000000
		FROM tr_dinhmuc_govan 
		WHERE masp = @masp AND nguyenlieu NOT IN ('', '0')

		-- danh sách nguyên liệu
		SELECT @nguyenlieu = COALESCE(@nguyenlieu + ', ', '') + nguyenlieu 
		FROM tr_dinhmuc_govan
		WHERE masp = @masp
			AND nguyenlieu NOT IN ('', '0')
		GROUP BY nguyenlieu
		ORDER BY nguyenlieu

		UPDATE tr_sanpham
		SET m3_tc = @m3_tc, 
			m2_tc = @m2_tc, 
			nguyenlieu = @nguyenlieu
		WHERE masp = @masp
	
		EXEC TR_SANPHAM_GETM2 @masp;
		EXEC TR_DINHMUC_GOVAN_UPDATE_PCODE @masp;
	  END
	  ELSE IF @bomType = 'NKI'
	  BEGIN
		UPDATE tr_sanpham
		SET IsNguKim = @trangthai
		WHERE masp = @masp
	  END
	  ELSE IF @bomType = 'DGO'
	  BEGIN
		UPDATE tr_sanpham
		SET IsBaoBi = @trangthai
		WHERE masp = @masp
	  END
	  ELSE IF @bomType = 'SON'
	  BEGIN
		UPDATE tr_sanpham
		SET IsSon = @trangthai
		WHERE masp = @masp
	  END
	  ELSE IF @bomType = 'VENEER'
	  BEGIN
		UPDATE tr_sanpham
		SET IsVeneer = @trangthai
		WHERE masp = @masp
	  END
  
	  FETCH NEXT FROM cur INTO @masp, @mausac
	END
	CLOSE cur
	DEALLOCATE cur
END
","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.cur","dbo.fn_split","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_sanpham"],"writesTables":["dbo.tr_sanpham"],"flags":["has-cursor","has-while","has-group-by","calls-other-proc"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
